narrative:
Goshen Twp township has 2,097 registered voters, with 55.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 30.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 17.2 percentage points.
